case_title: AUGUSTINA MARISTELA VS. TARGET CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED AND ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE; AND FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT TARGET STORES A DIVISION OF TARGET CORPORATION
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-07-2005 CONTINUED TO FEB-18-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR COMPLETION OF TRANSFER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARISTELA, AUGUSTINA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE: GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY TRANSFER COSTS PLUS REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEYS' FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $415.80 PURSUANT TO CCP 396(B). PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. DEPT. #301, JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN; REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2005 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2005 Continued To Jun-06-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Gail Trabich, Esq., appearing for Defendant Target Stores, and specially appearing for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 6/6/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Irene Burns. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-04-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2004 Continued To Feb-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT TARGET STORES' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Matter is transferred to San Mateo County Superior Court. Plaintiff shall pay transfer costs plus reasonable expenses and attorneys' fees in the amount of $415.80 pursuant to CCP 396(b). Prevailing party is to prepare a proposed form of order.(301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
